title: Zombie Pep Squad
description: A high school zombie tale with the world record for most stings in a movie ever. They’ve got spirit, how ’bout you?
quote: What do you say we ditch the party and head on up to Make Out Point?
altHero: blonde cheerleader screaming in her boyfriend’s face
alt1: cheerleader screaming as a corpse cheerleader falls out of her locker
alt3: group of zombie cheerleaders walking down the hallway
alt4: cheerleader screams as two zombie cheerleaders dangle upside down and surround her
